title: Louisiana photographer captures stunning, long-exposure portraits of ancient cypress trees
description: Each exposure lasts up to eight minutes — long enough for the water to smooth and the clouds to soften.

title: Hidden treasures: Spanish archaeologists discover trove of ancient shipwrecks in Bay of Gibraltar
description: Researchers identify wrecks at the bottom of the sea from as far back as the fifth century BC, from Europe and beyond
